mapper.insert: insert into task (pro_id , com_id , task_name , task_desc , task_status , pm_id , task_start_date , task_end_date , parent_task_id , created_at , updated_at) values(#{proId} , #{comId} , #{taskName} , #{taskDesc} , #{taskStatus} , #{pmId}, #{taskStartDate}, #{taskEndDate}, #{parentTaskId, jdbcType=INTEGER}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE)
mapper.select: with task_hierarchy ( task_id, pro_id, pm_id, com_id, task_name, task_desc, task_status, task_start_date, task_end_date, parent_task_id, task_path ) as ( select task_id, pro_id, pm_id, com_id, task_name, task_desc, task_status, task_start_date, task_end_date, parent_task_id, CAST(task_id as VARCHAR2(200)) from task where pro_id = #{proId} AND parent_task_id IS NULL UNION ALL select t.task_id, t.pro_id, t.pm_id, t.com_id, t.task_name, t.task_desc, t.task_status, t.task_start_date, t.task_end_date, t.parent_task_id, th.task_path || ',' || t.task_id from task t INNER JOIN task_hierarchy th ON t.parent_task_id = th.task_id where t.pro_id = #{proId} ) select * from task_hierarchy order by task_path
mapper.update: update task set task_name = #{taskName}, task_desc = #{taskDesc}, task_status = #{taskStatus}, task_start_date = #{taskStartDate}, task_end_date = #{taskEndDate}, parent_task_id = #{parentTaskId, jdbcType=INTEGER} where task_id = #{taskId}
mapper.select: SELECT task_id, task_name, task_status, task_start_date, task_end_date, parent_task_id, LEVEL AS depth FROM task START WITH parent_task_id = #{taskId} CONNECT BY PRIOR task_id = parent_task_id ORDER BY LEVEL
